SiteShell.footerIntro: Browser-first PDF and image tools for compressing, merging, splitting, and converting documents before upload, sharing, and submission.
SiteShell.footerMeta: No login. No install. Built for fast document tasks.
SiteShell.footerHighlight2: Merge multiple PDFs into one file
SiteShell.footerHighlight8: Turn JPG images into one PDF
SiteShell.footerTagline: Precision browser-first document tools for compression, merge, split, and conversion workflows.

compress.label: Compress
compress.title: Compress PDF
compress.copy: Reduce file size for uploads, portals, attachments, and image-heavy scans.

merge.label: Merge
merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.copy: Combine multiple PDF files into one clean document before sending or compressing.

split.label: Split
split.title: Split PDF
split.copy: Extract page ranges from one PDF and export smaller files for uploads or follow-up compression.

rotate.label: Rotate
rotate.title: Rotate PDF
rotate.copy: Turn sideways or upside-down pages upright before submitting or merging.

remove.label: Remove
remove.title: Remove PDF pages
remove.copy: Delete blank, duplicate, or unnecessary pages before uploading a cleaner PDF.

reorder.label: Reorder
reorder.title: Reorder PDF pages
reorder.copy: Move pages into the right sequence before export, merge, or compression.

pdfToJpg.label: PDF to JPG
pdfToJpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdfToJpg.copy: Export one JPG per PDF page for previews, sharing, uploads, and visual extraction.

jpgToPdf.label: JPG to PDF
jpgToPdf.title: JPG to PDF
jpgToPdf.copy: Combine screenshots, scans, and image files into one PDF document in the browser.
